title: Show HN: Forge – Guardrails take an 8B model from 53% to 99% on agentic tasks
summary: Forge is an open-source reliability layer for self-hosted LLM tool-calling that boosts an 8B model from ~53% to ~99% on agentic tasks using domain-agnostic guardrails (retry nudges, error recovery, step enforcement, VRAM-aware context management). It runs on consumer hardware, includes an eval harness, and reveals that serving backend choice can cause 75-point accuracy swings. Peer-reviewed at ACM CAIS '26.
